members.name: filterStages
members.signature: fn filterStages(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, client: *llm.LlmClient, query: []const u8, stages: []const types.Stage) -> []types.Stage
members.comment: Processes a query by filtering stages using an allocator and returns a cleaned slice of stages.

members.name: filterSeeAlso
members.signature: fn filterSeeAlso(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, client: *llm.LlmClient, query: []const u8, entries: []const SeeAlsoEntry, max_keep: usize) -> [][]const u8
members.comment:
Filter "Used in files" (see_also) entries for relevance using the fast LLM.
Given a list of file paths and their context, returns only the most relevant ones.
Uses bounded context: `keyword: comment` format for each entry.
Returns an owned slice of owned strings; caller must free.

members.name: keepAll
members.signature: fn keepAll(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, entries: []const SeeAlsoEntry) -> [][]const u8

members.name: askRelevant
members.signature: fn askRelevant(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, client: *llm.LlmClient, query: []const u8, content: []const u8) -> bool
members.comment:
Ask the LLM whether `content` is relevant to `query`.
Returns true (keep) or false (discard).  Fails open on error.

members.name: dupeStage
members.signature: fn dupeStage(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, s: types.Stage) -> types.Stage
members.comment: Deep-copy a Stage so the returned copy fully owns its strings.
